description: The anesthesia quality department has commissioned a hemodynamic monitoring audit using Vital Recorder. Identify which of the three surgical cases in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\ (0001.vital, 0002.vital, and 0003.vital) include invasive arterial blood pressure monitoring (ART track). For any case containing the ART track, export the full vital signs dataset to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\art_case_export.csv. Produce a comprehensive audit report saved to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\art_audit_report.txt documenting which cases contain invasive arterial monitoring, the recording duration of each case reviewed, and a brief clinical rationale for the importance of invasive arterial monitoring in hemodynamic management for noncardiac surgery. Login: Windows Desktop user (no Vital Recorder login required).
